question: Is the Dalmatian completely replaced by a single robotic dog?
Does the robotic dog feature metallic or hard-surface textures instead of organic fur?
Is the robotic dog positioned in the same location and scaled proportionally to the original subject?
Are the specular highlights on the robotic dog consistent with the light source coming from the upper right?
Does the robotic dog cast a consistent shadow and appear grounded on the grass?
Are the trees, stone wall, rolling hills, and sky in the background completely unchanged?
Is the grassy field surrounding the dog preserved without unnatural smearing or repainting?
Is the overall golden-hour lighting and color grading of the scene preserved?
Is the robotic dog free from structural artifacts like disconnected parts, extra limbs, or warped geometry?
Is the edited area free from visible seams, jagged edges, or noise inconsistencies?
